posts.author: nati-erez (Nati Erez)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi everyone,

I’ve started to use Monday a few months ago and it’s great!

I have a question (it might be a feature request, by I’d like to see if it can be done and I missed it first).
I’m using Monday to manage the tasks of my team. I added a calendar widget to a dashboard that shows all of their tasks (actually, sub-tasks if it matters), and I colored them by the person in charge (each subtask has a single assignee).
Can I customize the colors? Some of the automatically chosen colors are too close and it’s confusing.

Thanks,
Nati
